title: Watch: Pig wanders into S.C. home, gets chased off with a broom
fullText:
Feb. 25 (UPI) -- A South Carolina family's doorbell camera captured the moment a neighbor's escaped pig pushed their front door open and wandered into their house.
Jessalynn Oliver explained in a social media post that she was inside cooking when the intruder entered her Woodruf home.

"I closed the fridge door and I spy with my little eye a giant pig staring in from the other end of the living room," Oliver wrote.
The video shows Oliver, wielding a broom, and her dog chasing the pig out of the house.
"He thought he was safe in the flower bed; was going to have himself a little snack. Not by the hair on my chinny chin chin, he got a spanking with the broom," Oliver wrote.
Oliver said she ended up chasing the pig all the way back to her neighbor's home.

summary: A South Carolina family's doorbell camera captured the moment a neighbor's escaped pig pushed their front door open and wandered into their house.
